Petition To Compel The Respondents To Deposit Estate Funds From The Estate Of John Juniton Davisson With The San Francisco County Treasurers Office
Off Calendar Feb-28-2018 Continued To Mar-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following mattes were heard: PES-09-292750 The Estate of Robert Haney and PES-04-285718 The Estate of Jason Juniton Davisson.

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf and Janet Boessenecker for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Brian Connors for and with Paul Elissiry of Estate Research Associates (Objector/Petitioner).

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to whether or not escheating is appropriate as known heirs have been located, as to the procedures the Public Administrator has in place with respect to turning funds over to the Treasurer, who authorized holding of these accounts and the length of time the funds have been held, the Public Administrator's failure to comply with the law, whether or not the Public Administrator should be ordered to deposit funds with the Treasurer, whether or not they should proceed in the process of determining heirs, etc. Mr. Connors requested an evidentiary hearing on the Petition for Instructions. The Petitions for Instructions (2) and the Petitions to Compel Respondent to Deposit Estate Funds, etc. (2) are continued to March 19, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to be heard with the Petitions to Determine Persons Entitled to Distribution of Estate (2).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Court Reporter: Sheila Pham, CSR #13293, (415-591-333).

Petition To Compel The Respondents To Deposit Estate Funds From The Estate Of John Juniton Davisson With The San Francisco County Treasurers Office

Off Calendar Feb-14-2018 Continued To Feb-28-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-22-2017 Continued To Feb-14-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

The following mattes were heard: PES-09-292750 The Estate of Robert Haney and PES-04-285718 The Estate of Jason Juniton Davisson.

Appearances: Steven Weinkauf of Public Administrator.
Brian Connors for and with Paul Elissiry of Estate Research Associates (Objector).

Counsel presented oral argument to the support their positions with respect the Court ordering the Public Administrator to deposit funds with the County Treasurer or allow a continuance for the Public Administrator to locate additional heirs. The Court ordered the Parties to attend a settlement conference with Pang Ly (Court Settlement Commissioner) on February 6, 2018 at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 603. Both Petitions for Instructions are continued to February 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to allow the Public Administrator to ascertain all of the heirs.

Judge: Lynn O'Malley Taylor. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Santiago. Not reported.

Petition For Instructions
Off Calendar Nov-13-2017 Continued To Nov-22-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brian Connors for Estate Research Associates (Objecting Party).

The Court noted that Mr. Weinkauf was not present. Mr. Connors stated that there is a companion case (Estate of Robert Haney) that got continued to November 22, 2017, that they are related because they are basically the same transactions, that there are similar facts and circumstances, that there is a writ of mandate and that a demurrer is scheduled for December 4, 2017. The Petition for Instructions is continued to November 22, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
